frontmatter.title: Rattan Charm
frontmatter.title_sub: Redefining the Bedroom in BSD House with Full Ceiling Weave
frontmatter.abstract: This project delves into two design options: Pyramid and Wave Rattan pattern generation. The Pyramid approach involves systematically creating intricate two-dimensional patterns, refining them in the third dimension using weaving techniques, thereby enhancing the understanding of multidimensional pattern manipulation. The Wave design introduces a rattan object shaped like a flag for the ceiling, fulfilling the client’s need for visibility from diverse angles, particularly from the bed. This addition contributes a dynamic and visually appealing element to the overall space.
frontmatter.pr_contribution: Research and Development, Conceptual Design, Digital Modeling & Scripting

mdx.body:
# Inspiration & Pattern Generation
## Pyramid (Option 1) ![Inspiration: Pyramid](./figures/rattan-charm-inspiration-opt-01-pyramid.jpg "Inspiration: Pyramid") Inspiration: Pyramid. In Option 1 Pyramid Design, systematic iterations produced intricate 2D patterns extended into the third dimension (Z-coordinate). Weaving methods like (0-1-1-0) and (0-1-0-1) enhanced pattern manipulation across multiple dimensions. ![Pattern Generation: Pyramid](./figures/rattan-charm-pattern-generation-opt-01-pyramid.jpg "Pattern Generation: Pyramid") Pattern Generation: Pyramid. ![Pattern Generation: Pyramid (Perspective)](./figures/rattan-charm-pattern-generation-opt-01-pyramid-pers.jpg "Pattern Generation: Pyramid (Perspective)") Pattern Generation: Pyramid (Perspective).
## Wave (Option 2) ![Inspiration: Wave](./figures/rattan-charm-inspiration-opt-02-wave.jpg "Inspiration: Wave") Inspiration: Wave. In Option 2 Wave Design, a rattan object resembling a flag acts as an elegant ceiling ornament. The client’s request for visibility, especially from the bed, enhances the space with a dynamic and visually appealing element. ![Pattern Generation: Wave](./figures/rattan-charm-pattern-generation-opt-02-wave.jpg "Pattern Generation: Wave") Pattern Generation: Wave. ![Pattern Generation: Wave (Perspective)](./figures/rattan-charm-pattern-generation-opt-02-wave-pers.jpg "Pattern Generation: Wave (Perspective)") Pattern Generation: Wave (Perspective).
# Design & Details
## Pyramid ![Design Details: Pyramid](./figures/rattan-charm-design-details-opt-01-pyramid.jpg "Design Details: Pyramid") Design Details: Pyramid. Based on the iterations conducted, the axonometric design of Option 1 Pyramid is composed of several 4x6 panels, totaling 24 panels arranged diagonally.
## Wave ![Design Details: Wave](./figures/rattan-charm-design-details-opt-02-wave.jpg "Design Details: Wave") Design Details: Wave. Based on the iterations conducted, the design of Option 2 Wave consists of 3 elongated panels locked along their length.

frontmatter.abstract: This project delves into two design options: Pyramid and Wave Rattan pattern generation. The Pyramid approach involves systematically creating intricate two-dimensional patterns, refining them in the third dimension using weaving techniques, thereby enhancing the understanding of multidimensional pattern manipulation. The Wave design introduces a rattan object shaped like a flag for the ceiling, fulfilling the client’s need for visibility from diverse angles, particularly from the bed. This addition contributes a dynamic and visually appealing element to the overall space.
